memberdef.argsstring: (Credentials &InCredentialsRef, Settings const &InSettingsRef, FHttpRetrySchedulerBase &InHttpRef, TSharedPtr< AccelByte::FApiClient, ESPMode::ThreadSafe > const &InApiClient=nullptr)
memberdef.name: PresenceBroadcastEvent

briefdescription.para: Check whether game platform info is already sent.

simplesect.para: true if it's already send game platform info, false otherwise.

memberdef.argsstring: (EAccelByteGameState State, FVoidHandler const &OnSuccess, FErrorHandler const &OnError, FString const &Description="")
memberdef.name: SetGameState

briefdescription.para: Set game state. It will send presence event immediately.

parameterdescription.para: Callback for successful send game state
Callback for failed send game state

briefdescription.para: Set the interval of sending presence event. By default it sends the queued events once in a ten minute. Should not be less than 5 seconds.
Set a delegate to be triggered when error sending presence event.
Set a delegate to be triggered when succeeded sending presence event.

parameterdescription.para: Callback for successful send game platform
Callback for failed send game platform

briefdescription.para: Start heartbeat. This funtion is DEPRECATED, will be removed soon.
Stop heartbeat. This funtion is DEPRECATED, will be removed soon.
Send presence event securely and the user should be logged in first.
